title: Non-dollar stablecoins are struggling to crack 0.5% of market share

title: WLFI-linked AI Financial flags ‘going concern’ as losses mount
summary: The World Liberty Financial-linked AI Financial Corp. posted a net loss of $271.5 million in the first quarter of 2026, and flagged significant doubt it could continue operating for the next 12 months without intervention.

title: WHO Escalates Response to Ebola Outbreak
summary: World Health Organization Director-General Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus called for an international response to the Ebola outbreak at a meeting of the WHO's emergency committee in Geneva on Tuesday. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nigeria Must Grow 7% to Tackle Poverty, Banking Tycoon Says
summary: Aigboje Aig-Imoukhuede, chairman of Access Bank, the country’s largest bank, discusses what he says is key to mobilizing domestic capital and in turn attracting international investment. He speaks with Bloomberg Television's Jennifer Zabasajja in Nairobi, Kenya.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Minnesota Bans Prediction Markets—And Is Sued By the Trump Admin Hours Later
